title: ESM Adoption Soars in JavaScript Ecosystem

topics.title: ESM vs CJS Growth
topics.summary: The adoption of ECMAScript Modules (ESM) continues to rise, with 38.0% of popular npm packages now supporting ESM, up from 33.4% six months ago. ESM-only packages have also increased from 12.6% to 16.0%, indicating a significant shift towards modern JavaScript module standards.

topics.title: Upcoming Talk at Web Engines Hackfest
topics.summary: A talk about npmx.dev will be presented by @patak.cat and @danielroe.dev at the Web Engines Hackfest in A Coruña. This event aims to connect with browser engine developers and share insights about npmx and its developments in the community.
